narrative:
Pleasant Township has 4,866 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.0 percentage points.
